verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In my moment of fear, Through every pain, every tear There's a God whose been faithful to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When my strength was all gone When my heart had no song Still in love, He's proven faithful to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every word He's promised is true And what I've thought was impossible I've seen my God do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He's been faithful, Faithful to me Looking back His love and mercy I see Though in my heart, I have questioned Even failed to believe Yet He's been faithful, faithful to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When my heart looked away The many times I could not pray Still my God, He was faithful to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The days I spent so selfishly Reaching out for what pleased me Even then, God was faithful to me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Every time I come back to Him He is waiting with open arms And I see once again
